zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel FitzRaven於大約1120年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈特菲爾德時，她的父親William FitzRaven30歲，母親Mabel De Bosville30歲。她和Otto Tilly至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1212年之後。

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel FitzRaven was born about 1120, in Hatfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William FitzRaven, was 30 and her mother, Mabel De Bosville, was 30. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Otto Tilly. She died after 1212.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel FitzRaven est née environ 1120, à Hatfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzRaven, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mabel De Bosville, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Otto Tilly. Elle est décédée après 1212.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel FitzRaven um 1120 in Hatfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzRaven 30 und ihre Mutter Mabel De Bosville 30. Sie hatte mit Otto Tilly mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1212.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzRaven è nata il circa 1120 nel Hatfield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William FitzRaven, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mabel De Bosville, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Otto Tilly. Morì dopo il 1212.

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzRaven(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzRaven(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel De Bosville(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Otto Tilly(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1212년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel FitzRaven родилась около 1120 г. в местности хатфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William FitzRaven было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel De Bosville, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Otto Tilly. Она умерла после 1212 г.
